== 3. Na4?! ==
This move attacks the bishop, but it allows [[/3...Bxf2|3...Bxf2+!]], a sacrifice, which leads to wild complications favouring Black after 4. Kxf2 Qh4+ 5. Ke3 Qf4+ 6. Kd3 d5, as in the famous {{w|Immortal Draw}} game between Hamppe and Meitner.
